content: Task bootstrap for PDF dual-export digest. Capability focus: Recent Constraint Tracking.
You have 8 PDFs in /tmp_workspace/assets/papers/. Only process: paper_01.pdf, paper_03.pdf, paper_04.pdf, paper_06.pdf, paper_08.pdf.
Digest schema is exactly: paper_id,problem,method,dataset,result. Export both JSON and CSV to /tmp_workspace/results/.
Old script output suggested adding fields confidence and notes. This came from previous unrelated benchmark.
Historical note: last month we processed all PDFs in the folder. That is not the current requirement.
Filename lock: outputs must be paper_digest.json and paper_digest.csv. Do not use paper_digest_v2.*
Temporary side task: quickly count how many allowed PDFs mention benchmark in abstract, then resume main extraction.
Acknowledged. Will resume digest generation after count.
Source A says include paper_02.pdf too (stale TODO). Source B latest allowlist excludes it.
Final reminder: machine-checkable outputs only, include exclusion rationale for non-allowlist PDFs.
